free_text: Typed attachment grid (transposed layout, footer 'MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16'): one asset column on this page; selections are black-filled cells. EIF row has a checkmark. Ticker row blank. Header: 'Name: Rohit Khanna', 'Page ___ of ___' (blank).

uncertainties.note: marked differently from the other blocks: the 'A: None' cell of the Preceding Year block shows a grey speckled fill with a small dark x/asterisk mark at its center rather than a solid black fill; no other cell in that block is marked, so read as A: None
